title: Creative Tooltips
description: Made to add more Legendary Tooltips for some mods.
body:
A resource pack made to be used with the [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) mod, adding cool tooltips to multiple mods.


So far, has compatibility with :\
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) items (andesite, brass, copper, netherite and creative tier items) ;\
[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) (ancient tomes) ;\
[Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) (all of it) ;\
Vanilla (enchanted books).
